info.title: PyFAPI
info.summary: Python FastAPI mongodb app for Enterprise usage with best practices, tools, and more.
info.description: Python FastAPI mongodb app for Enterprise usage with best practices, tools, and more.

get.description:
Get activity logs with optional filtering and pagination.
Admin access required.

parameters.name: start_date

schema.description: Filter activities from this date (ISO format)
schema.title: Start Date

parameters.description: Filter activities from this date (ISO format)

parameters.name: end_date

schema.description: Filter activities until this date (ISO format)
schema.title: End Date

parameters.description: Filter activities until this date (ISO format)

post.description:
Create a new activity log entry.
Admin access required.

get.description:
Get a specific activity log by ID.
Admin access required.

put.description:
Update an existing activity log entry.
Admin access required.

delete.description:
Delete an activity log entry.
Admin access required.

get.description:
Get activity logs for a specific user with pagination.
Admin access required.

Get summary statistics for activities in the last N days.
Admin access required.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of days to look back

post.description:
Clean up old activity logs (for data maintenance).
Admin access required.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Delete logs older than this many days
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Delete logs older than this many days

parameters.name: skills

schema.description: List of skills to search for
schema.title: Skills

parameters.description: List of skills to search for
